lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/voidpilot-knowledge.md 'Frontend Artifact Content Format' section to reflect that signed-in sessions now persist artifacts to Cloud Storage + Firestore (artifacts subcollection) and turns to Firestore (turns subcollection with latest document), while guest sessions remain React-state-only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Backend Routes section: the new REST endpoints for brainstorm persistence — PUT/GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/sessions/{id}/turns, PATCH /api/v1/live/brainstorm/sessions/{id}/title, PUT/GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/sessions/{id}/artifacts, GET /api/v1/live/brainstorm/sessions/{id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download. These are owner-auth-protected endpoints for signed-in session persistence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewers noted that AGENTS.md Backend Routes section only lists WS endpoints and /health, /api/v1/hello. The new REST endpoints at src/app/api/v1/endpoints/brainstorm.py (lines 374-531) are undocumented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention that brainstorm REST endpoints use `body: dict` instead of Pydantic models for request body validation. This is consistent across all brainstorm persistence endpoints (sessions, turns, artifacts) and is intentional hackathon-posture tech debt. Workers should follow this pattern for consistency unless the convention is explicitly changed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature brainstorm-signed-in-turn-persistence reviewer noted `body: dict` at brainstorm.py lines 374, 419, 446. Feature brainstorm-artifact-persistence reviewer noted the same pattern. Both flagged it as convention debt, not a bug.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that brainstorm persistence services share private helpers (_now_timestamp, _raise_session_dependency_error) imported across module boundaries from brainstorm_session_library. If this pattern grows, consider extracting to a shared brainstorm_persistence_utils module.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both brainstorm_turn_persistence.py and brainstorm_artifact_persistence.py import underscore-prefixed helpers from brainstorm_session_library. Two consumers of the same private API.

rejectedObservations.observation: Firestore subcollection pattern for turns (turns/latest) should be documented in library.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already covered in the applied library update to voidpilot-knowledge.md which now describes both the artifacts subcollection and turns subcollection structure.
